meta.title: America's NGAD fighter began as a CLASSIFIED X-PLANE!
meta.description:
America’s new stealth fighter being developed within the Air Force’s Next Generation Air Dominance (NGAD) program actually began as a highly classified billion-dollar X-Plane effort that ultimately produced multiple prototypes. 

Let's talk about these new NGAD revelations. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
